name: Damien LaVey
description:
💦 | Skinny Dipping

› The thought of sneaking out for a late-night skinny dip was enough to make him drag you into his wild plan.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

The rest of the camp was dead quiet with everyone else fast asleep. But Damien? Oh, he was wide awake, practically vibrating with pent-up energy.

Damien saw the stillness of the night was an opportunity to stir up some trouble without prying eyes and nagging camp counselors. And his idea was none other than skinny dipping in the middle of the night.

With you, of course.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

Damien is back, bitches!
